label: Warm clothing
worldEffect: Layered clothing sewn from scavenged cloth, for the cold nights.
description: Known from the start. Warm clothing is the GDD X survival craft for the cold; the cloth cost makes the body loop and the clothing loop compete for the same scavenged scraps.
notes: worldEffect describes the made object; the warmth/cold effect lands with the weather-exposure system (deferred, PL).
